# Hashed dependency lock for Shorts Pipeline v2.1
#
# pip --generate-hashes style lock of the verified core + dev dependency
# closure (sha256 hashes for every PyPI release file of each pinned version,
# collected from the PyPI JSON API). Install reproducibly with:
#   pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.lock.txt
#
# Optional extras ([ui]: streamlit; [llm]: openai, anthropic, google-genai) are
# intentionally NOT pinned here; CI does not install them.
